signals.title: Early Exit Signal
signals.content: Cash out at 1.5x-2.0x in first 3 rounds. High probability of early crash after a big green.

signals.title: Green Pattern
signals.content: After 3+ red rounds, expect a green multiplier above 3x. Place bet and hold for at least 3x.

signals.title: Morning Momentum
signals.content: Early morning sessions (6-9 AM) show higher average multipliers. Best time for consistent wins.

tips.title: Bankroll Management
tips.content: Never bet more than 5% of your bankroll on a single round. Use the 1-3-2-6 strategy for consistent growth.

tips.title: When to Cash Out
tips.content: Set a target multiplier before each round and stick to it. Greed is the #1 reason players lose.

tips.title: Pattern Recognition
tips.content: Watch for patterns: after 3 consecutive reds (below 2x), the 4th round often goes above 3x. But never chase losses.

tips.title: Stop Loss Limits
tips.content: Set a daily loss limit (e.g., 20% of bankroll). If you hit it, stop playing for the day. Discipline is key.
